injuries.comment: The Kraken said that McCann is OUT for Monday's (Sep. 29) game against the Flames.
The Kraken said that Montour will be a game-time decision for Thursday's (Oct. 9) game versus the Ducks.
The Kraken said that Stephenson is OUT for Wednesday's (Oct. 1) game against the Oilers.
The Kraken said that Dunn is OUT for Wednesday's (Oct. 1) game against the Oilers.
